rules.title: Network IOC Detection [59fba5608107]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [59fba5608107]
id: cdb-net-59fba5608107
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 7 malicious IPs and 2 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-06-28
modified: 2026-06-28
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '4.0.4.1'
            - '1.0.0.41'
            - '1.0.9.4'
            - '1.3.4.3'
            - '169.254.169.254'
            - '2.7.9.8'
            - '0.0.0.0'
        DestinationHostname|contains:
            - 'kubevirt.io'
            - 'evil.com'
    condition: selection
level: medium
falsepositives:
    - Shared hosting infrastructure
    - CDN/cloud provider IP overlap
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://cyberdudebivash.com/threat-intel
source_advisories: CVE-2026-13325: A flaw was found in KubeVirt's migration proxy. When spec.configuration.migrations.disableTLS is set to true on the Kube
CVE-2025-68052: Unauthenticated Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Eagle Booking <= 1.3.4.3 versions.
CVE-2026-57620: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Tim Strifler Exclu
CVE-2026-40080: Cacti is an open source performance and fault management framework. Versions 1.2.30 and prior are vulnerable to Open Red
CVE-2026-57940: HTMLy 3.1.1 contains a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in the RSS feed import functionality. The functi
CVE-2026-13318: A server-side request forgery (SSRF) flaw was found in KubeVirt's virt-api port-forward handler. When processing a port-
CVE-2026-54820: Unauthenticated SQL Injection in JetBooking <= 4.0.4.1 versions.
CVE-2025-68074: Contributor Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in Image Carousel <= 1.0.0.41 versions.
CVE-2025-68064: Contributor Local File Inclusion in Goya Core < 1.0.9.4 versions.

rules.title: Network Intel YARA [59fba5608107]
rules.content:
rule CDB_SENTINEL_Network_Intel_59fba5608107
{
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51"
        description = "Detects network IOCs from threat intelligence feeds"
        date = "2026-06-28"
        severity = "high"
        reference = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        batch_id = "59fba5608107"
        ioc_count = 9

    strings:
        $ip_0 = "4.0.4.1" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_1 = "1.0.0.41" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_2 = "1.0.9.4" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_3 = "1.3.4.3" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_4 = "169.254.169.254" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_5 = "2.7.9.8" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_6 = "0.0.0.0" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_7 = "kubevirt.io" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_8 = "evil.com" ascii wide nocase

    condition:
        filesize < 100MB and any of them
}
